title: Smooth Boot
description: This mod enhances CPU scheduling in Minecraft. As an unofficial fork of the Smooth Boot (Reloaded) mod, it adds support for new game versions.
body:
## Smooth Boot

This mod enhances CPU scheduling in Minecraft. As an unofficial fork of the Smooth Boot (Reloaded) mod, it adds support for new game versions.

The mod works by reconfiguring Minecraft's task executors to improve loading efficiency. By default, these executors run intensive startup tasks across multiple threads, often causing peak CPU utilization. Smooth Boot optimizes this process by modifying key executor parameters, including thread count and priority, ensuring a more balanced and efficient workload.







Original mod : https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-boot-reloaded

Original mod author: https://modrinth.com/user/AbdElAziz
